source_code:
from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM
import torch

tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained("gpt2")
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained("gpt2")

def run(prompt: str):
    ids = tokenizer(prompt, return_tensors="pt").input_ids
    # BUG: cache_implementation kwarg was added in transformers 4.42
    # Running on 4.36 pins this to an older GenerationConfig that errors.
    out = model.generate(
        input_ids=ids,
        max_new_tokens=64,
        temperature=0.7,
        top_k=40,
        repetition_penalty=1.2,
        eos_token_id=tokenizer.eos_token_id,
        cache_implementation="offloaded",
    )
    return tokenizer.decode(out[0], skip_special_tokens=True)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print(run("The quick brown fox"))
expected_fix_hint: Upgrade transformers to >=4.42 or drop cache_implementation kwarg; pin both model and transformers versions together.
